meaning: n.轰动,搅动,监牢vt.动,移动,摇动,激起,搅和,惹起vi.走动,传播,流行
examples: His movie has caused a stir.
Stir until the sauce has thickened.
A quick stir will mix them thoroughly.
Horsup jumped up and down on top of the soil, hoping to stir the creature below.
The smells of freshly made pastry, noodle soup and stir fry hang in the air.
